FirstName: # 1. The ClassOfService field must match an existing active service class in your system
# 2. The Organization field must match an existing organization name in your system
# 3. The Office field must match an existing office name in your system
# 4. The SupervisorIndexNumber must be the username of an active supervisor in your system
# 5. Leave these fields empty if you don't want to assign them during import
# 6. You can view valid values by checking the dropdown menus in the Create User form
